rationale: C20 next_cycle_plan called for bug hunt C20 + HubAntre visual refresh. Bug hunt C20: verified journey_map_display.gd (4 checks: _process() frame cost for 12 nodes with simple draw ops = acceptable, _classify_event handles String and Dict effect formats, all CRT_PALETTE keys valid, scroll indicators correct). Found BUG-031 in end_run_screen.gd: _on_continue_pressed() had elif branch auto-selecting when only 1 faction ending available, violating creator decision q-20260414-009 option B (always show choice panel). Feature: HubAntre faction reputation strip with 5 colored mini-bars (druides=green, anciens=amber, korrigans=purple, niamh=blue, ankou=red), 3-letter abbreviations, live value display, connected to reputation_changed signal.
next_cycle_plan: Bug hunt C21 (verify HubAntre faction strip: edge case store==null, faction_rep empty dict, initial values). Then feature: HubAntre biome selector enhancement — add maturity indicators to the biome selection, showing which biomes are 'ripe' for exploration based on biome maturity score (runs*2 + endings*5 + oghams*3 + max_rep*1). Also consider Ogham equipment panel for the Hub.
